# Kiosk shutdown checklist

Do these when the market closes.

## Before you go

- Count the cash drawer
- Run `report daily` on the tablet
- Cover the display shelf

# Studio closing checklist

Do these before leaving the studio.

- Turn off the hallway lights

# Printer queue change

Large jobs move to the copy room printer.

## Decision

> Send jobs over ten pages to the copy room.

## Steps

1. Count your pages
2. Pick the right printer
3. Collect the printout

# PRINTER QUEUE CHANGE

LARGE JOBS MOVE TO THE COPY ROOM PRINTER.

## DECISION

> SEND JOBS OVER TEN PAGES TO THE COPY ROOM.

## STEPS

1. COUNT YOUR PAGES
2. PICK THE RIGHT PRINTER
3. COLLECT THE PRINTOUT

# Recycling bin change

The kitchen bins get new labels this week.

## Decision

> Sort paper and plastic into the labeled bins.

## Steps

1. Check the bin label
2. Empty your desk tray
3. Flatten the boxes

# RECYCLING BIN CHANGE

THE KITCHEN BINS GET NEW LABELS THIS WEEK.

## DECISION

> SORT PAPER AND PLASTIC INTO THE LABELED BINS.

## STEPS

1. CHECK THE BIN LABEL
2. EMPTY YOUR DESK TRAY
3. FLATTEN THE BOXES

# Meeting room booking change

We are moving to one shared booking sheet.

## Decision

> Book rooms on the shared sheet, not in chat.

## Steps

1. Open the shared sheet
2. Pick a free slot
3. Add your team name

# MEETING ROOM BOOKING CHANGE

WE ARE MOVING TO ONE SHARED BOOKING SHEET.

## DECISION

> BOOK ROOMS ON THE SHARED SHEET, NOT IN CHAT.

## STEPS

1. OPEN THE SHARED SHEET
2. PICK A FREE SLOT
3. ADD YOUR TEAM NAME
